11/104. Chan eil na h-oidhirpean sgioblachaidh aig Bing uabhasach soirbheachail! Bing's efforts at tidying up his mess are less than successful.
12/104. Tha Bing caran teagmhach mu bhith dol sìos an t-sleamhnag ùr aig an raon-chluich'. Bing is feeling a bit apprehensive about going down the new slide at the playground.
9/26. Owl wants to enter a drawing contest, but fears his work is not good enough.

programmes.show_name: 'S E Iasg a Th'Annam (I'm a Fish)
programmes.show_description: 2/52. Tha sinn a' cluinntinn mu dhèidhinn na dòighean-beatha aig creachannan-mòra an diugh. We meet a giant clam today who tells us all about her species and their way of life.
...Adventures of Abney & Teal. 30/52. Teal is having a lovely time in the flowers that are blooming all over the island. She brings a bunch to Abney, but they make him sneeze again and again!
6/26. Petit, Laura, Greg and Roman visit Petit's cousin, who's a super fan of princesses.
22/80. Gilleasbaig Fearghasdan a' leughadh Am Prionnsa Cinders. Gilleasbaig Ferguson reads Am Prionnsa Cinders.
9/13. Tha Na Neachdan air an glacadh ann an cuartan -  's chan eil iad leotha fhèin! The Neachdan are trapped in a maze, and they are not alone!
4/6. Chan eil duine sam bith a' leantainn nan siostaman ùra aig Ciorstaidh agus chan eil i idir toilichte. No one is following Ciorstaidh's new systems, and she isn't happy about it.
2/2. Calum Macdonald introduces his personal highlights from the craziest news show on BBC ALBA!
...Ploc/The Rubbish World of Dave Spud. 46/52. Dave uses a magnet to search for treasure, but ends up attracting all of the town's metal - and not just the small stuff.
2/6. Those story of blind golfers who play for Scotland, and we follow European Tour player Laura Murray through more of her training.
22/26. Eilidh Lewsey chats to Joy in the studio and Calum Maclean is in Crail in Fife, meeting poet Deborah Moffatt to discuss 20th century Gaelic poets.
Naidheachdan ionadail, nàiseanta is eadar-nàiseanta gach là cuide ri fiosrachadh coimhearsnachd bho BBC ALBA. Local, national and international news and information from BBC ALBA.
6/8. Ramsay MacMahon goes for a hike with Norman MacLeod. Ramsay MacMahon a'falbh air chuairt cuide ri Tormod MacLeòid.
2/4. In Europe's North and Baltic Seas, a look at dolphins catching salmon and skuas fighting to protect their chicks.
9/12. Tha treat sònraichte aig Abigail airson brunch, Lof Banana. Abigail has a special brunch treat, a banana loaf.
4/6. Coinneach MacFhraing seeks out unclimbed lines and challenging new routes on the remote and beautiful island of Rona.
Cathy Macdonald on Bram Stoker's iconic horror novel, Dracula. Cathy Dhòmhnallach air an leabhar ainmeil oillte aig Bram Stoker, Dracula.
4/4. Includes problems at the ferry office, an all-action grudge against the boss in the workplace and an everlasting proposal. Contains some strong language.
Sealladh ùr bho Alba. A new view from Scotland.
Sealladh ùr bho Alba. A new view from Scotland.
6/52. Tha rud neònach air a' phlanaid. Coltach ri ugh agus robot - ughbot 's dòcha? An odd thing has landed on the planet. It's like an egg and a robot - an eggbot perhaps?
14/15. Eilidh visits Rose and her beautiful greyhound dogs, Libby and Marvin. We learn how to look after dogs and find out about all the activities they get up to together.
19/21. To find the best flowers for Mama and Papa, Oona and Baba follow some bees. Gus na lusan as fheàrr fhaighinn 'son mamaidh is Papaidh, the Oona is Baba a' leanail sheilleanan.
20/21. Baba has a swimming lesson with Oona. Diving proves difficult - but Baba is determined! Tha leasan snàimh aig baba còmhla ri Oona. Tha daibheadh na dhùbhlan - ach tha Baba daingeann!
6/26. Petit, Laura, Greg and Roman visit Petit's cousin, who's a super fan of princesses.
9/26. Owl wants to enter a drawing contest, but fears his work is not good enough.
23/80. Mòrag Anna NicNèill a' leughadh A' Choinean Chòir. Morag Ann MacNeil reads A' Choinean Chòir.
...Ath-dhoras/The Royals Next Door. 39/52. Tha Stella a' cur àm teaghlaich seachad le Molaidh aig a' phàirc-spèilidh. Stella spends some family time with Molly at the skate park.
...Ath-dhoras/The Royals Next Door. 40/52. Tha Stella a' cluinntinn gusgal mu Mhgr. Bruno. Ach bheil e fìor? Stella hears gossip about Mgr Bruno. But is it true?
2/9. Tha Tiago deich bliadhna a' dh'aois agus ag innse dhuinn mu chànan nam bodhar. Tiago is ten and tells us about sign language.
10/13. Tha an t-seoth' tàlant gus bhith ann ach saoil a bheil tàlant dha-rìribh aig Tabaidh? The talent show is going to take place, but does Tabaidh really have a talent?
10/20. Bitzer thinks the future has arrived when he takes delivery of his new high tech farmyard control module. But when the gadget malfunctions, Bitzer is left wishing for his old whistle.
Naidheachdan ionadail, nàiseanta is eadar-nàiseanta gach là cuide ri fiosrachadh coimhearsnachd bho BBC ALBA. Local, national and international news and information from BBC ALBA.
3/13. Drama Gàidhlig stèidhichte ann an Leòdhas. Gaelic soap based on the Isle of Lewis.
10/12. Tha Abigail a' toirt thugainn biadh blasta airson brunch, Tost Frangach. Abigail looks at a tasty addition to your brunch options - french toast.
3/8. Ramsay is on his bike for an adventure taking in the sights and history of East Lothian. Ramsay air a bhaidhseagail a'siubhal tro sheallaidhean is eachdraidh Lodainn an Ear.
1/6. Join Peter as he starts work on the house and travels to a crofting stronghold in Lewis. Thigibh cuide ri Pàdruig 's e tòiseachadh a' togail taigh agus a' siubhal gu Leòdhas.
Ball-coise nam ban ann an Alba bho shealladh luchd-cluiche, luchd-leantainn & eòlaichean. Women's football in Scotland seen through the eyes of players, fans and experts.
2/4. To preserve Romanian wildlife, a 150km-long passage was created in 2010: the Zarand corridor. For bears, this gateway is key to survival.
19/33. An còmhlan alt-pop à Lodainn an Ear, racecar, le seisean acoustic aig Belladrum 2025. East Lothian alt-pop band racecar perform an acoustic session.

programmes.show_name: Cuirm aig Celtic Connections | Valtos & Caraidean
programmes.show_description: 1/3. Valtos and friends in concert for Celtic Connections. Presented by Megan MacLellan.
